My research spans machine learning, physics-informed modeling, and optimization for engineered systems—from nanophotonics and semiconductor verification to quantum circuit synthesis and multi-agent scientific inference.\par
\medskip

Methodologically I focus on scalable algorithms (including CUDA-accelerated workflows), generative and simulation-based modeling, and collaboration across disciplines.\par
\medskip
